subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath, with the key of His Most Great Name, opened the doors of the hearts of all peoples and made known unto them His path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی فتح بمفتاح اسمه الاعظم ابواب افئده العالم و عرفهم سبیله
subcodes.subjects: @Abraham; Isaac; Ishmael, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @praise and encouragement
